details.reasoning: The implementation successfully adds json_path constraint support to SGLang with all major requirements met: (1) json_path parameter added to SglSamplingParams and SglGen in lang/IR layer, (2) json_path_utils.py provides conversion to JSON schema for validation via existing grammar backends, (3) proper registration in grammar_manager.py with dispatch handling in base_grammar_backend.py, (4) json_path identifier appears in IR definitions, (5) follows existing constraint patterns (parallel to json_schema handling). Integration is thorough across interpreter, sampling_params, OpenAI protocol, and endpoint code. Test kit provided. Minor issue: PLAN.md file is empty and should document the implementation approach, but this doesn't affect functionality. The implementation is well-structured, handles edge cases in JSONPath parsing, and reuses existing validation infrastructure effectively.
